label: Atlas Core
description: The infrastructure layer: librarian, status manager, estimability manager, layer connector. Owns no biological products of its own.

label: Inversion Atlas
description: Discovery + karyotyping + characterisation of inversion candidates. Manuscript stress test: LG01 × LG28 pair-relation.

label: Relatedness Atlas
description: ngsRelate → ngsPedigree → Mendelian QC chain. Provides the relatedness backbone that meiosis + manuscript path A depend on.

label: Meiosis Atlas
description: Dyads / triads / CO / DCO / coefficient-of-coincidence + interchromosomal effects of inversions on meiosis.

label: Evolution Atlas
description: Arrangement origin, selection scenarios, evolution summary. Reads polarised karyotype layer + meiosis effects.

label: Genome / Synteny Atlas
description: Chromosome correspondence, cross-species synteny, fusion / fission, breakpoint catalogue.

label: Marker Design
description: Per-inversion + interchromosomal marker panels; assay readiness.
